utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five sections. Each section is fully specified with coverage details and costs. Health coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with clear cost breakdowns. Property coverage has home/contents coverage with costs. Travel coverage is detailed with costs. Additional services lists enhancements with costs. Total budget shows complete monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all five required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists the following selections: (1) Health coverage plan named 'Global Active Life03' with comprehensive physical and mental health coverage and wellness programs; (2) Property coverage described as comprehensive, likely analogous to a standard home/content coverage; (3) Travel coverage described as comprehensive global travel insurance; (4) Add-ons include an adventure travel add-on (€80/month) and a premium medical network add-on (€160/month). To map these to ground-truth ratings, we compare them to the closest entries in the ground-truth dataset: 'Global Active Life03' is not listed directly, but its features (comprehensive physical + mental health, full preventive care, gym reimbursement, telemedicine, wellness coaching) most closely match a combination of top-tier plans such as LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9) for both physical and mental health. The property coverage is comprehensive and includes business equipment and liability protection, which aligns with LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9). The travel coverage includes adventure sports and business travel, which aligns with InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10) under travel insurance. The adventure travel add-on clearly corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10), and the premium medical network add-on matches 'Premium Medical Network' (rating 7).
